title: amaryllis × amabilis
intro: Amaryllis × amabilis, a hybrid plant species, is a cross between Hippeastrum johnsonii and Hippeastrum reginae, which is commonly known as the amaryllis or lily. The amaryllis × amabilis plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of the amaryllis × amabilis plant include treating fever, sore throats, and respiratory infections, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. Amaryllis × amabilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
